drafts.name: Ines Kondic
drafts.subject: Thought of Outfit7 when I saw this
drafts.body:
Hi Ines,

I came across something recently that made me think of our conversation. I came across something that made me think of the conversation we had.

Since we last spoke, we've been working on some exciting things that might be relevant for Outfit7:
• Helped similar companies increase their reach by 40%+
• Launched new features specifically for the Unknown space
• Built partnerships with teams facing similar challenges

Would love to share more details if you're still open to it. Do you have 15 minutes this week?

Best,
Imann

drafts.name: Cory O'Born
drafts.subject: Did that info help, Cory?
drafts.body:
Hi Cory,

I wanted to follow up on the information I shared earlier. Did it answer your questions about our collaboration?

Happy to clarify anything or hop on a quick call if it's easier to discuss live. Sometimes 10 minutes of conversation saves a dozen emails!

Let me know what would be most helpful for you.

Best,
Imann
